# Dobson Headlight Restoration

> Professional headlight restoration and ceramic coating services based in Lethbridge, Alberta, Canada. Mobile service available — we come to you — or drop off at our heated shop. Starting at $99 CAD. Rated 5.0 stars on Google with 47+ reviews. Guarantee: no results, no pay.

## Quick Facts

- Business name: Dobson Headlight Restoration
- Owner: Isaac Dobson
- Location: Lethbridge, Alberta, Canada
- Phone/Text: 587-402-4794
- Email: dobsonheadlights@gmail.com
- Website: https://www.dobsonheadlightrestoration.com
- Service area: Lethbridge, Taber, Cardston, Raymond, Coaldale, Coalhurst, Fort Macleod, Magrath, and surrounding Southern Alberta
- Rating: 5.0 stars (47+ Google reviews)
- Guarantee: No results, no pay

## How Much Does Headlight Restoration Cost in Lethbridge?

Headlight restoration in Lethbridge, Alberta starts at $99 CAD for the standard package. The premium package with Ceramic Pro 9H coating starts at $169 CAD. New light protection for factory-new headlights is priced by custom quote. All packages include a re-do warranty — if headlights fade early, Dobson comes back and fixes it for free. There are no hidden fees and payment is digital.

## How Long Does Headlight Restoration Last?

Standard headlight restoration lasts 1–2 years. Premium restoration with ceramic coating lasts 5+ years. Dobson Headlight Restoration offers a re-do warranty on all work. The ceramic coating used is Ceramic Pro 9H, an industrial-grade product that bonds to the lens surface and resists UV degradation, road debris, and Alberta's extreme seasonal temperature swings.

## Is Headlight Restoration Worth It vs. Replacement?

Yes. Headlight restoration costs $99–$169 at Dobson compared to $200–$1,000+ per headlight assembly for dealer replacement. Yellowed headlights reduce light output by up to 80%, making restoration both a safety and cost issue. Restored headlights return to factory clarity within 60–90 minutes. Dobson offers a no-results, no-pay guarantee, eliminating financial risk for the customer.

## Services

- **Standard Restoration** ($99+): Multi-step oxidation removal, precision machine polishing, industrial UV Top Coat. 1–2 year durability, factory clarity restored. Includes 1-Year Clarity Warranty.
- **Premium + Ceramic** ($169+): Everything in Standard plus Ceramic Pro 9H Coating, fog light treatment included, 5-Year Clarity Warranty. Currently $20 off (limited spots).
- **New Light Protection** (Custom Quote): Industrial ceramic coating for factory-new headlights to prevent yellowing. Adds 5–8 years of protection on top of factory life. Lifetime Clarity Warranty.
- **Fleet Maintenance** ($79+/vehicle): Volume discount for 5+ vehicles, on-site service, DOT compliance check, priority booking.
- **Heavy Duty / Semi** ($149+): Specialized restoration for large truck lenses and deep oxidation.
- **Dealership Partner** (Wholesale): Maximize resale value on pre-owned inventory, same-day turnaround available.

## Service Area

Dobson Headlight Restoration serves all of Southern Alberta with mobile service. Primary service area includes Lethbridge, Taber, Cardston, Raymond, Coaldale, Coalhurst, Fort Macleod, Glenwood, and Magrath. During winter months, service is performed from a heated shop rather than mobile.

## Hours

Monday – Saturday: 8:00 AM – 9:00 PM. Early morning and late evening bookings available on request.

## About

Dobson Headlight Restoration is Lethbridge's #1 rated mobile headlight restoration specialist, serving Southern Alberta. Owner Isaac Dobson specializes in standard oxidation removal, premium Ceramic Pro 9H coating, fleet vehicle programs, and dealership partnerships. All work comes with a re-do warranty. Service takes 60–90 minutes. No customer presence required — digital payment accepted.
